name: Hed Shoter!
description: Fitting a Hyperion barrel greatly tightens accuracy, cuts recoil and adds a small 8 percent critical hit bonus. In return, it loses some raw damage and has a noticeably smaller magazine, which is painful on most Bandit builds. The improved hit rate makes it better at steady damage, especially when you can land headshots. Best used at close to mid range, using cover to manage frequent reloads.
notes: Only appears at green rarity or above. World drop from any appropriate loot source.
